title: Innovation L-Shape Set
brand_hint: Likely Innovations laminate desking line (similar to #35, #52)

specs.materials: 1" thick top and gables, thermally fused melamine on 45 lb industrial particle board core (per Innovations line)
key_features: L-shape desk set in the Innovations laminate desking line
specs.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on laminates; 2-year warranty on moving components
specs.notes: Innovations is a value-tier laminate desking line; specific manufacturer/SKU not surfaced via web. Same family as hero #52 (INNOVATIONS Double Pedestal Desk). Verify with supplier.
specs.who_its_for: This L-shape desk set is a solid choice for administrative staff and department heads in schools, non-profits, and municipal offices who need a two-zone workspace with built-in storage.
